programme.title: The Patrick Star Show
programme.desc: The Patrick Show gets competing sponsors. // The star family visits King Neptune's palace.

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show
programme.desc: In an alternate universe, the Star family is a team of superheroes, or at least they think they are.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Rusty strikes a deal with Morpheus that for a seemingly small price, Morpheus will cast spells for him. // Lincoln starts to work at Dad's restaurant when he hears that the best employee wins a dish named in their honor.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: The Action News team springs into action to figure out who is behind a mysterious string of pranks. // When Lincoln and friends discover Gus has a hidden talent, they work together to help him live out his dream.

programme.title: Wylde Pak
programme.desc: Jack \u0026 Lily are half-siblings living on opposite ends of the world both hoping to have the \"best summer ever.\" When dangerous events forces Jack's mom to send him to live with his dad, the kids fear their summer dreams have become a nightmare.

programme.title: Wylde Pak
programme.desc: Will \u0026 Min show Jack around to help him find a good story. Lily spills boba in Jack's suitcase and tries to hide the evidence. // Jack tries to find \"the big picture\" as Lily shows him how to spend a perfect summer day in Canyon Valley.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob is challenged by E.V.I.L. to make a delivery to their secret lair in 10 minutes or less. // When Mr. Krabs gets trapped inside of Pearl's new boat, he must pretend to be its engine to avoid being caught.

programme.title: The Marsupilamis
programme.desc: Bibi goes live, but when she's not getting enough likes Twister steps in to help, and is almost unmasked. // Gran Gran's convinced the Chahuta and won't impress a food critic, so tries to change things.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Annoyed by Leni's intrusive babysitting, Lisa accidentally blasts herself and Todd into space.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln gets a tutor that all his sisters instantly get crushes on, making it impossible for Lincoln to study. // The kids complain about their house, but when a tornado threatens to destroy it, they start to feel differently.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Tensions run high when Lincoln and Clyde both get an internship at Flip's and compete to win the manager title. // When Lincoln sees how tame Pop Pop has gotten in his older age, he takes him out for a day to remember.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lola tries to whip Mom into tip-top pageant condition for a Mother-Daughter pageant.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Undercover
programme.desc: Billy arrives, hopeful that his new sidekick Steve can join the T-Force. Phoebe and Max consider it, but soon discover that his superpower is making marshmallows. After they reject Steve's bid to join the team, he turns evil and vows revenge.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Undercover
programme.desc: The Thundermans are visited by High Tide, the former protector of Secret Shores. But when they explain to him that they are the new superheroes in town, he decides to take back his old role, even if it puts Jinx and Booch in danger.

programme.title: Henry Danger
programme.desc: With an invitation to Swellview's most exclusive restaurant, Henry decides to bring his boss, Ray, but finds it more complicated than expected.

programme.title: Henry Danger
programme.desc: After Jasper is lauded for being a local hero, Henry becomes jealous that Kid Danger is the one getting thanks while Henry himself gets nothing.

programme.title: Danger Force
programme.desc: Danger Force and Captain Man go undercover as bad guys at The Beatin' Dungeon to catch a criminal. If their cover is blown, they'll have to fight all of Swellview's toughest villains at once.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: A 'Messing With Lewbert' sketch goes horribly awry, injuring Carly’s obnoxious doorman. The gang nurses him back to health until Freddie’s mother steps in and takes over. When a romance starts to blossom they have to stop it.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When Carly, Sam, and Spencer bring Freddie to their favorite pie shop, they learn that its proprietor has passed away. Worse more, it appears that his recipes may be lost forever.

programme.title: Victorious
programme.desc: Tori is excited when she gets cast as the lead in the school play, but she has to deal with her very unhappy understudy Jade. Tori has to avoid Jade's constant sabotage so she can perform on opening night.

programme.title: Sam \u0026 Cat
programme.desc: When Sam eats all of the moon meatballs Cat prepared for a Special Moon Dinner, Cat has to make more. Cat gets distracted when she finds a shoe and becomes obsessed with finding its matching pair.

programme.title: Tales of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: When Leo accidentally saves a subway station full of innocent people, he's inspired to take on a life of crime-fighting vigilantism as the Night Ninja! But has he met his match with the villainous La Fleur and her gang of dognappers?

programme.title: Tales of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: The villainous, dog-hating madman known as SCRATCH holds the city's dogs hostage! His only demand? For the Night Ninja to surrender! But Leo, April and the Turtles realize there's more to Scratch than meets the eye.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Sandy tries to study SpongeBob and Patrick’s behavior, but her science experiment goes horribly awry. // Mr. Krabs takes Plankton’s advice, and finally marries the only thing he ever loved…money!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Pearl gets a job to be cool like her friends, but the only store that’s hiring is the lamest store at the mall! // SpongeBob loses the use of his thumbs, and must get them back in working order before his entire life falls apart.

programme.title: The Marsupilamis
programme.desc: Bibi goes live, but when she's not getting enough likes Twister steps in to help, and is almost unmasked. // Gran Gran's convinced the Chahuta and won't impress a food critic, so tries to change things.

programme.title: Best and Bester
programme.desc: Best and Bester turn themselves into chess pieces but have to abandon their game to save the sub from flooding. // Bester and Best are tasked with neutralising the enemy agent's ransomware for the Bettervale Investigation Bureau.

programme.title: Best and Bester
programme.desc: Best and Bester go on an undercover mission to find out why items of laundry are going missing at the Dry Cleaners. // In an unfortunate case of mistaken identity, Best has been mistaken for the notorious jewel thief, Jimmy Muggins.

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show
programme.desc: Patrick and Squidina report the news around Bikini Bottom. // The Patrick Show presents the epic conclusion to the first half of its first season.

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show
programme.desc: The Star family finds themselves getting smaller and smaller. // Patrick's evil twin cousin shows up to ruin Patrick' reputation.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Plankton poses as a wish-granting genie in his latest scheme to get the secret formula. // Mr. Krabs' new Krabby soup is a hit - until some heat-loving hippies move into the soup vat!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: When Mr. Krabs gets in trouble for littering, he makes SpongeBob and Squidward clean up Bikini Bottom.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Undercover
programme.desc: Max and Phoebe are working well as a team, until he is accused of committing crimes and Phoebe must apprehend him. Now on the lam, Max learns that the Mastermind's henchman is secretly controlling his actions via a chip in his neck.

programme.title: Danger Force
programme.desc: When Danger Force's fingerprints show up on crime scene evidence, they must break into police headquarters and wipe the prints, or their secret identities--and Danger Force itself--will be ruined.

programme.title: Henry Danger
programme.desc: Charlotte's birthday road trip to see the Boo Man Group perform gets sidetracked by a Captain Man and Kid Danger emergency.

programme.title: Tales of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: The Mutanimals turn on the Ninja Turtles after Ray Fillet accuses them of attacking him in Central Park! The Turtles realize a mutant snapping turtle named Tokka is on the loose, drawing Donnie to a terrifying laboratory on Staten Island!

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: When all 10 of Lincoln’s sisters ask him to cover for them on the same day, Lincoln has his hands full. // Bobby and Lori go on a double date with Lincoln and Bobby’s little sister, Ronnie Anne.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: When Lucy gets a crush on a “regular and normal” boy, her sisters give her a makeover.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob's new friend is a giant fluffy hamster. There's one problem, though: no one else can see him! // Patrick wants to be a horse!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Gary has a pet translation collar, and he's talking up a storm. Everyone loves it... except for Squidward! // When a small clown gets left behind by the circus, SpongeBob takes the hapless harlequin under his wing.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob builds a snail-house outside for Gary to play in while he is at work.

programme.title: The Marsupilamis
programme.desc: Mica's Marsup journal ends up in Acu's bag so he has to get it back before his friend finds it. // Twister, is fed up of Hope and Punch's pranks, so he builds his own cardboard house which Stan finds.

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show
programme.desc: Patrick learns what GrandPat's childhood was like. // Cave Pat hosts a show with his cave family.

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show
programme.desc: Patrick and SpongeBob work at the movie theater to watch a new premiere.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln wishes he had ten brothers instead of ten sisters, and Lisa gives him a glimpse into that reality. // Lola wants to be a part of the siblings' secrets club, but they won't let her in because she's a 'tattle tale'.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln becomes Luan's clown assistant but starts hogging the spotlight. // The Loud kids set out to show Lisa what is 'fun' about a snow day.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: After seeing a scary movie (that his parents told him not to), Lincoln can’t go to sleep and pulls an all-nighter. // When a common cold ravages through the loud house, Lincoln believes his sisters have turned into Zombies!

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln gets a tutor that all his sisters instantly get crushes on, making it impossible for Lincoln to study. // The kids complain about their house, but when a tornado threatens to destroy it, they start to feel differently.

programme.title: Wylde Pak
programme.desc: Min tries to avoid the usual Woori World chaos, but when the family splits up they all get lost in their own fiascos. // Jack's mission to find the rare DVD sequel of his favorite movie leads him to the mysterious Collector.

programme.title: Wylde Pak
programme.desc: Seeking closure on her favorite K-Drama, Lily films her own finale with her family as the cast \u0026 crew.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob cleans up all the garbage in town... except for one stubborn ball of trash. // SpongeBob and Mr. Krabs attempt to serve Krabby Patties at Pearl's school without being caught by the strict lunch lady.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick have their peaceful day of jelly fishing disturbed by Sandy's competitive nature.

programme.title: The Marsupilamis
programme.desc: Mica's Marsup journal ends up in Acu's bag so he has to get it back before his friend finds it. // Twister, is fed up of Hope and Punch's pranks, so he builds his own cardboard house which Stan finds.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: After Lincoln gets a pink hand-me-down bike from Lori, he borrows Lynn's cool BMX bike without telling her. // Someone clogged the Loud House toilet and Lincoln sets out to find out whodunit.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: After spilling an experiment of Lisa's, Lincoln sets off a chain reaction that unravels the household. // In an effort to be more energy-efficient Lincoln rallies his family to stop using so much electricity.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Pop Pop introduces his new girlfriend to the family. She seems great until she starts showing up unannounced.

programme.title: Wylde Pak
programme.desc: When the house AC breaks during an extreme heat wave, Will takes it upon himself to protect his family and fix it. // Ellie insists on running Raven Club like a dictatorship, so Jack \u0026 Lil quit, and Ellie must save her investigation AND best friends.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Undercover
programme.desc: Mrs. Wong visits Secret Shores, and threatens to reveal the Thundermans' superhero identities to the town. But Max and Phoebe's plan to have Dr. Colosso keep her quiet backfires in ways they could not have imagined.

programme.title: Henry Danger
programme.desc: Things get a little buggy when Schwoz installs a new operating system on the Man Cave Computer designed to detect and eliminate threats all over Swellview.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly, Sam, and Freddie want their web show to be reviewed by 'Nevelocity', a really popular website that reviews websites and webcasts. When Carly goes to meet Nevel, she finds out he is an annoying boy who wants to date her.

programme.title: Victorious
programme.desc: Tori goes all out to master an iconic Hollywood Arts monologue in Sikowitz's class. Meanwhile, André and Robbie join a ballet class to meet girls with disastrous results.

programme.title: Sam \u0026 Cat
programme.desc: British con artists Gwen and Ruby return and, while pretending to be friendly, drive a wedge between Sam and Cat. When Sam and Cat catch on to this, they turn the tables on Gwen and Ruby.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: When Mom and Dad meet an impressive family they worry their kids aren't doing enough to ensure successful futures. // Tired of Lynn's poor sportsmanship during board games, the siblings decide to team up to take her down.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: The sisters enlist the \"Master of Convincing\" (AKA Lincoln) to teach them how to ask Mom and Dad for money. // Lisa gets her report card and finds she's failed 'social skills'. To bring up her grade, she must make a friend.

programme.title: Wylde Pak
programme.desc: Halmoni falls in love with a customer's dog. Rather than return him, she dog-naps him and goes on the lam! // Jack volunteers to run the Groom \u0026 Board solo, but when a pet snake causes chaos he must protect the other pets from the jaws of death!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs has an accident and leaves SpongeBob in charge of the Krusty Krab. What could go wrong? // Patrick takes a job at the Goofy Goober when he finds out the employees get free ice cream.

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show
programme.desc: Cecil shows Patrick his mustache collection. // The Star family brings a mandrake root into their home.

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show
programme.desc: Cecil works a new temp job as a security guard at Lady Upturn's art museum.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: To win their school film festival, Lincoln and Clyde cast Lynn as their movie's extreme stunt double. // A fishing trip with Gramps turns into an obsessive chase when Gramps' old fish rival, Moby Rick, swims nearby.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: When Darcy's birthday party falls on the same day as one of Lisa's hero scientist's talks, Lisa sends TODD in her place to the party. // Flip sees a lucrative business opportunity when he discovers Nacho has the ability to predict the weather.

programme.title: Wylde Pak
programme.desc: The family prepares for war, AKA a trip to the local Asian market. After their battle to procure a rare cookie, Jack feels more part of the family. // The Groom \u0026 Board gets a bad review. Lily tries to find the culprit and \"correct the record.

programme.title: Wylde Pak

programme.title: Rubble \u0026 Crew
programme.desc: When Speed Meister sabotages the stage for the town Talent Show, the pups use Motor's talent to save the day. // Sierra Sparkle is coming to sing for Builder Cove Day! But when the band's instruments break, Rubble \u0026 Crew have a construction solution.

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: The pups need to get a sleepwalking bear back home before he wakes up. // Daring Danny X takes his horse off the trail and ends up on a wild ride.

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: Pups need to lure a big ape onto the PAW Patroller so they can take him back to the jungle. // Skye Kitty gets stuck beside an eagle's nest and needs help getting down.

programme.title: Dora
programme.desc: Dora and Boots race their boxcar against Croc Racers in the Rainforest Race. / Dora and Boots secretly hand out Big Red Chicken's birthday invites to all their friends in time for his birthday party.

programme.title: Dora
programme.desc: Dora, Boots, and Diego help a baby burrowing owl find its parents and make it home.

programme.title: Tim Rex In Space
programme.desc: Tim and Kai try to uncover trinkets buried at the beach.

programme.title: Tim Rex In Space
programme.desc: Tim has a clearout of all his old stuff, but soon finds not all of it is destined for the rubbish bin.

programme.title: Tim Rex In Space
programme.desc: Tim, Tia and Tommy try to convince Mum and Dad to let them have a pet.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and George visit Granny Pig and Grandpa Pig's house. Grandpa Pig has built a tree house for them.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and George are having a costume party. Peppa is a fairy princess, and George is a dinosaur. Peppa has to pick which of her friends is wearing the best costume.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and her family go to the museum. Peppa imagines herself as a Queen in the King and Queen's room. George imagines being a big dinosaur in the Dinosaur Room.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: It is a super hot day, and all the mud puddles have dried up, so Peppa and George play in the wading pool.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Dr. Brown Bear comes to visit the playgroup and teach all of the children what to do when there's been an accident.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: When Tiddles the Tortoise gets stuck in a tree, Pedro Pony has trouble trying to rescue him!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa takes Goldie the Goldfish for a visit to the vets and is surprised when she finds that there's a new road to be built over the building!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: The family has all gone to the caves for a day out and Grampy Rabbit is their tour guide!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Mr. Potato has come to visit the playgroup and he's brought along his superhero friend, Super Potato!

programme.title: Barbapapa - One Big Happy Family!
programme.desc: The barbababies prepare a show for Barbamama's birthday. While Barbalala finishes up, they go to the carnival where Barbabeau gets stuck in an attraction. // Three separate stories telescope into a big final bouquet in the middle of the courtyard.

programme.title: Barbapapa - One Big Happy Family!
programme.desc: Barbalib, Barbalala and Barbabelle take turns as narrators to tell a story, each one bringing a very personal touch to it. // The Barbapapa family spends a day at the beach. Divided into 2 teams, the barbababies fight over a sandy peninsula.

programme.title: Sharkdog (2020)
programme.desc: While Max is out Olivia babysits Sharkdog but she just can't keep him inside.

programme.title: Sharkdog (2020)
programme.desc: Everyone's excited for the Foggy Springs carnival, but it's getting more and more difficult to keep Sharkdog a secret.

programme.title: Sharkdog (2020)
programme.desc: When the town discovers Sharkdog, Max needs to convince everyone that he's not a monster.

programme.title: Blaze And The Monster Machines
programme.desc: When Crusher and Pickle are trapped inside a cage over a bubbling slime swap, it's up to Blaze, AJ, and Sparkle to become...Knights! Will they be able to rescue Crusher and Pickle from the swamp before it's too late?

programme.title: Blaze And The Monster Machines
programme.desc: When Blaze's friends need help, Ambulance Blaze, Paramedic AJ and Paramedic Gabby have all the tools they need to save the day!

programme.title: Rubble \u0026 Crew
programme.desc: Skye visits Rubble \u0026 Crew from Adventure Bay when their construction project needs some aerial support. But when Speed Meister tries to beat the pups to finish the job, Skye, Rubble, and the rest of the crew jump into rescue mode to save the day!

programme.title: Rubble \u0026 Crew
programme.desc: Mayor Greatway asks Rubble \u0026 Crew to build something special for her friend Mr. Ducky-Doo. But soon a construction mystery is afoot... // Rubble \u0026 Crew work to build a rain tank for Farmer Zoe before a storm, until a chicken complication crops up.

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: Daring Danny’s at it again, luckily the Pups are able to raise their rig after Danny sinks the Paw Patroller. // Ryder and the Pups pair up with Alex and his mini patrol to retrieve mysteriously missing items.

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: The alien’s spaceship is on the fritz and shooting out anti-gravity rays. Ryder and the pups need to repair the spaceship. // A satellite is out of orbit and falling towards Adventure Bay, the PAW patrol must fix it before it crash lands.

programme.title: Barbapapa - One Big Happy Family!
programme.desc: Barbamama and Barbapapa are surprised to see more and more billboards on the road. // Barbalala dreams of becoming a cowgirl and Barbidou is determined to help her.

programme.title: Barbapapa - One Big Happy Family!
programme.desc: The Barbababies want to invent like Leonardo da Vinci. // The Barbababies must choose between going to the pool or going for a bike ride.

programme.title: Tim Rex In Space
programme.desc: Tim does all he can to get the new DinoStar toy. // It's a day for practical jokes, but Tim doesn't know when to stop. // Tim and Dad have to catch a troublesome mole.

programme.title: Tim Rex In Space
programme.desc: Tim explores Rumbleton to find somewhere he can have fun alone. // Tim and Kai try to give Parky the best day ever. // When a storm keeps the Rexes at home they must think of a game to pass the time.

programme.title: Dora
programme.desc: Dora and Boots take Claudia, an energetic young rain cloud, to rain on a dry water slide. / Boots gets a case of Tickle Tail that Ranita the Frog can cure if she gets her magic stripes by helping friends around the Rainforest.

programme.title: Dora
programme.desc: Dora and Boots help the Grumples make troll jelly before the Grumpy Old Troll's snack time. / Dora and Boots have to recover El Gatito Magico and put it in its special place so all the friends stop acting like a cat.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and George are re-enacting the Apollo Moon Landing with the help of Granny Pig's historical re-enactment society. Grampy Rabbit has lent them his rocket, but no one has told him it's just pretend.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Today is the fire station practise day. Mummy Pig joins with the other mummies to practise fighting fires. The fire brigade demonstrate their practice using their motto: Ready, Steady, Go!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Madame Gazelle must go to the dentist so leaves the class with Mr Bull. The children already know the subjects Mr Bull suggests teaching, so he decides to show them how to fix a squeaky floorboard.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Mummy Pig is baking an apple pie, so Daddy Pig suggests Peppa and George play a game of looking for things. Peppa and George have fun running around the house solving the clues.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Madame Gazelle introduces the children to poetry, explaining how sounds can be poems too. Together they make a poem about rain and perform it to the parents.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Granny and Grandpa talk to Peppa and George about manners. Madame Gazelle teaches all the children about how wonderful it is to say please and thank you.

programme.title: Ex with Benefits
programme.desc: A doctor is faced with his regrets when a medrep courting his business turns out to be an ex-girlfriend.

programme.title: Cuerpo Y Alma ep 9
programme.desc: Maya, a young nurse who has been having terrifying nightmares finds out a horrifying truth about a debt that was made to save her life when she was a child. As she's about to find out, the payment just may cost her much more than her life.

programme.title: Para sa Isa't Isa ep 4
programme.desc: Zion gets another shot at repairing his relationship with his wife, Erin by a wish on a well to go back in time. But he finds Erin not knowing him at all. He must now correct his mistakes and make her fall in love with him again.

programme.title: Hapi House Season 1 ep 5
programme.desc: A Sari-Sari Original Series. Ha-pi House is a home away from home for a group of single half-Pinoys and Pinoys born and raised overseas who have come home to rediscover their Filipino roots.

programme.title: Totoy Bato ep 232
programme.desc: The series is based on the graphic novel created by Carlo J. Caparas. Totoy Bato, a young man, fighting for justice for his lost loved ones; also fighting for equality and fairness against his old friend turned nemesis Dwayne.

programme.title: The Mysterious Case of Bea Montenegro ep 5
programme.desc: A Sari-Sari Original Series. Hot off the heels from her last cold case, investigative journalist Christine Del Mundo (Maui Taylor) is back with a brand new cold case. This time, it involves actress Bea Montenegro, whose death has only brought forth one suspect - a fellow model who suffers from face blindness.

programme.title: Blue Jeans ep 2
programme.desc: BLUE JEANS is a youth-oriented drama that follows the intersecting and intertwining lives of 6 present-day Filipino working students in the university belt.

programme.title: Hapi House Season 1 ep 5
programme.desc: A Sari-Sari Original Series. Ha-pi House is a home away from home for a group of single half-Pinoys and Pinoys born and raised overseas who have come home to rediscover their Filipino roots.

programme.title: Totoy Bato ep 232
programme.desc: The series is based on the graphic novel created by Carlo J. Caparas. Totoy Bato, a young man, fighting for justice for his lost loved ones; also fighting for equality and fairness against his old friend turned nemesis Dwayne.

programme.title: Sari Saring Sine: Campus Girls
programme.desc: Vangie, Georgie, Samantha and Diane are best of friends who encounter different journeys in life as they go through college. Their friendship gets tested when Diane and Georgie fight over the affections of college heartthrob Louie, while Samantha discovers that Vangie is her dad's young mistress.

programme.title: Hapi House Season 1 ep 5
programme.desc: A Sari-Sari Original Series. Ha-pi House is a home away from home for a group of single half-Pinoys and Pinoys born and raised overseas who have come home to rediscover their Filipino roots.

programme.title: Totoy Bato ep 232
programme.desc: The series is based on the graphic novel created by Carlo J. Caparas. Totoy Bato, a young man, fighting for justice for his lost loved ones; also fighting for equality and fairness against his old friend turned nemesis Dwayne.

programme.title: Di na Muli ep 12
programme.desc: ‘Di Na Muli tells the story of a young woman who tries to overcome her life's biggest regret (complicated by her special ability to see how much time remains of someone’s life) but ends up falling in love with the man who caused the death of her one great lov.

programme.title: Para sa Isa't Isa ep 4

programme.title: Whisper of Silent Body
programme.desc: Renowned as the \"corpse whisperer,\" forensic pathologist Qin Ming uncovers vital clues from the corpses. During a homicide investigation, he unravels a murder case sixteen years ago in the snowy mountain with his assistant and a detective. Together, they unveil the secrets of the mysterious homicide.

programme.title: Mama Ghost
programme.desc: In a coastal town, a forbidden romance sparks between Rico and Sisca, and their love unleashes a malevolent spirit. As chilling deaths plague the town, past secrets are being unraveled and the town is possessed by evil and fear. Rico must defy destiny and fight against the evil spirit to save his loved one.

programme.title: The Ghost Writer
programme.desc: A struggling writer must write a hit novel to save his career. He retreats to his childhood home where his father, also a successful writer, died mysteriously. Upon discovering his father's final manuscript, he realizes it's far superior to anything he could create. He decides to plagiarize the work, setting off a series of horrifying events.

programme.title: Paper Man
programme.desc: As the police investigate a gang murder case, another mysterious paper man murder happens, and the suspects get killed one by one. Continuing to track the clues of the case, the police finally unveil a hidden secret and tragedy over two generations.

programme.title: Chapter 1 Mae Nak Reborn
programme.desc: Mae Nak the ghost wife returns to take revenge for a pregnant woman who is sexually assaulted and loses her baby. No one can identify the assailant except Mae Nak, who turns into an evil spirit in order to punish the assailant for his evil deeds.

programme.desc: As the police investigate a gang murder case, another mysterious paper man murder happens, and the suspects get killed one by one. Continuing to track the clues of the case, the police finally unveil a hidden secret and tragedy over two generations.

programme.title: Chapter 1 Mae Nak Reborn
programme.desc: Mae Nak the ghost wife returns to take revenge for a pregnant woman who is sexually assaulted and loses her baby. No one can identify the assailant except Mae Nak, who turns into an evil spirit in order to punish the assailant for his evil deeds.

programme.title: Detrimental
programme.desc: You Ji Ren is a blind man who works at a factory in an outlying island. When the factory is cut off from the outside world by a hurricane one day, a monster appears and turns whoever sees it into black shadows. As You cannot see the monster, he is able to help other coworkers leave safely and fight to kill the monster!

programme.title: Get in the Dark
programme.desc: A reporter hears three horror stories when investigating a case of the paper doll spirit 20 years ago. Miss Qiao had died in vain then, and her butler paid a paper craftsman to make a paper doll to be buried with her. Miss Qiao’s spirit is revived to take revenge when the doll’s eyes are drawn, and a series of horrible events begins to happen...

programme.title: 3AM
programme.desc: The Hungry Ghost Festival is around the corner. A newcomer at a workplace offends the ghosts in his office building when he shows disrespect for the spirits on his first day at work. In the course of a night shift, the man and his colleagues working overtime experience spooky encounters that make them reflect on their behaviours and beliefs...

programme.title: She is in Danger
programme.desc: After a fight with her boyfriend, Xue leaves home to stay in a remote B\u0026B accommodation, together with a roommate Yi. One night, Xue accidentally discovers that Yi and another friend have killed Yi's ex-boyfriend, and is locked up by the duo so as to cover up the murder. Xue's buddy, Wen, comes seeking for her - can Xue and Wen escape from danger?

programme.title: 3AM
programme.desc: A woman in hospital accidentally discovers her husband’s affair. On the verge of breakdown, she begins to encounter a “stranger” who claims to also be a victim of the affair. Is this entity a figment of her imagination or a vengeful spirit? As she struggles to control her thoughts and actions, can she stop herself from hurting those around her?

programme.title: The Revenge
programme.desc: Ruo Wei returns to her childhood home with two best friends, and reunites with her cousin who has always lived there. While they plan to enjoy their trip, they are constantly haunted by paranormal events, ending up in a terrifying experience with unexpected outcome.

programme.title: The Getaway
programme.desc: Three KOLs set out to live‑stream their trip to a remote island, but are deceived by a mysterious old woman who traps them there, intent on finding brides for her disabled grandsons. As they are captured, they must race against time to escape.

programme.title: Guns of Eden
programme.desc: During a camping trip deep in the mountains, former Buffalo cop Megan and her friends stumble upon the local sheriff unlawfully executing a drug trafficker. Spotted and marked for death, they find every escape route sealed. To cover up his crime, the sheriff summons an armed militia to hunt them down—triggering a deadly chase with no way out.

programme.title: Jealousy
programme.desc: Model Min is admitted to a hospital, but mysteriously falls to her death at night. Rumour has it that the hospital is haunted. Subsequently, Min's photographer begins receiving eerie phone calls, the writer loses consciousness in a bizarre car accident, and her friend mysteriously disappears….

programme.title: Waning Moon
programme.desc: Nuanchan is a famous and highly respected spiritual medium in a rural village in Thailand. She wants to train her niece, Ploy, to succeed her and Ploy needs to remain a virgin. When Ploy falls in love with her childhood friend Tul, their lives are in danger as the secret of the spiritual world is being unveiled.

programme.title: Ghost Wedding
programme.desc: Photographer Zhi Cheng is entangled with a \"woman in red\", leading to the deaths of his relatives one by one. When the girl he likes, Si Tong, also dies mysteriously, Zhi Cheng vows to find out the truth but ends up revealing the secret of a \"ghost marriage\"...

programme.title: The Windmill Massacre
programme.desc: Jennifer joins a tour to explore the renowned windmills of the Netherlands. As their tour coach breaks down on the way, they seek refuge in a creepy shed near a sinister windmill with a dark history. When some tour members suddenly disappear, Jennifer discovers a shared secret among them, linking their fates in a chilling revelation.

programme.title: Anak Perjanjian Syaitan 2
programme.desc: Haunted since childhood, orphan Azlinda believes her torment stems from her parents' dark history. Her friends Zurina, Wati, and Ustaz join forces to end her suffering, but a malevolent demon interrupts their efforts. Will Azlinda succeed in severing the cursed ties that bind her, or is she destined to remain trapped in darkness forever?

programme.title: Model Family
programme.desc: A single-parent family (Yu Xiang and Tong Tong) move into a new neighbourhood where everyone’s life seems perfect. However, while things may look rosy on the outside, dark secrets and horror raid each family from the inside, and nothing really are as they seem.

programme.title: An Unquiet Grave
programme.desc: A year after Jamie's wife tragically died in a car accident, he persuades her sister, Ava, to accompany him to the accident site to perform a peculiar ritual. As the night progresses, it becomes evident that Jamie harbours sinister motives.

programme.title: Endless Love
programme.desc: A young girl encounters a novelist in a bar and quickly falls in love with him. However, it turns out she has fallen into a trap set up by the novelist and his ex-girlfriend who is a ghost with a disfigured face. The journey of revenge and ultimate terror has just begun!

programme.title: Run All Night
programme.desc: Lately, it seems Jimmy's only solace can be found at the bottom of a whiskey glass. But when Jimmy's estranged son, Mike (The Killing's Joel Kinnaman), becomes a target, Jimmy must make a choice between the crime family he chose and the real family he abandoned long ago. With Mike on the run, Jimmy's only penance for his past mistakes may be to keep his son from the same fate Jimmy is certain he'll face himself...at the wrong end of a gun. Now, with nowhere safe to turn, Jimmy just has one night to figure out exactly where his loyalties lie and to see if he can finally make things right.

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Comic superstar Steve Carell takes on the role of Agent Maxwell Smart and Anne Hathaway steps into the shoes of sexy Agent 99 as the two superspies out to save the world from the nefarious forces of KAOS in this romp based on the classic television show created by Mel Brooks and Buck Henry.

programme.title: Storage HuntERs S3 3
programme.desc: Jesse knows you don't strike it rich if you play it safe, so he gambles big on a risky bin. Then, Lori defies her husband Brandon and buys a questionable unit. Will her bold move lead to a dynasty or divorce? And later, lightning erupts when the buyers battle it out for a puzzle of parts they hope will add up to one smooth ride.

programme.title: ER S1 8
programme.desc: Dr. Susan Lewis notices that Dr. Cvetic is ill-tempered lately. Benton has family problems. Carol takes care of a rape victim. Doug is overwhelmed by his position as acting chief.

programme.title: Dodgeball ThundERdome S1 1
programme.desc: Contestants from all walks of life compete for glory and $25,000 cash in an arena unlike any other.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S5 05
programme.desc: Michael reveals the transformative properties of fruits and vegetables, and shows a caterer the true power of dairy products. Plus, an antique store customer is stunned when a species of termite literally chews through the scenery!

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S5 06
programme.desc: At an antique store, Michael shows off an impossible way to organize your clothes, and back at the supermarket we find out that there are some serious surprises lurking in our favorite foods. Finally, at the Navy Yard, Michael pushes his skills to the limit when he attempts one of his most ambitious feats yet - tricking two people at the same time!

programme.title: Caught! (Season 2) S2 1
programme.desc: Police takedowns can be risky business when criminals are armed and dangerous. That's why officers rely on non-lethal tactics like tasers, bean bag rounds and K-9 units to subdue suspects.

programme.title: Caught! (Season 2) S2 2
programme.desc: Watch semi-trucks wreak havoc on roadways, criminals flee cops in pursuit, and crashes, collisions and cars flying through the air -- a dashboard camera can capture it all.

programme.title: ER S1 8
programme.desc: Dr. Susan Lewis notices that Dr. Cvetic is ill-tempered lately. Benton has family problems. Carol takes care of a rape victim. Doug is overwhelmed by his position as acting chief.

programme.title: Impractical JokERs S1 6
programme.desc: Four friends compete to embarrass each other in the ultimate hidden camera showdown. The guys massage beachgoers on the boardwalk, broadcast the news from Times Square, and get their kicks teaching a karate class.

programme.title: Storage HuntERs S3 5
programme.desc: A deadly bin puts all the buyers on edge. It's a bad omen that casts a dark shadow over the day. As the day winds to a fever pitch, Brandon and Lori square off against Scott and Chrissy in a do or die bidding war that sends all strategy out the window. And later, our competitors uncover a high-tech find they think could worth thousands. But all that glitters may not be gold.

programme.title: Storage HuntERs S3 6
programme.desc: Cash flies over a locker that reveals a high-ticket mystery item. Then, everyone digs deep to win an ATM, but when the dust settles will this thing be filled with big bucks or major regret? And later, the unlikeliest of duos team up with a strategy that leaves our buyers' heads spinning.

programme.title: ER S1 9
programme.desc: Ross continues his relationship with saleswoman Linda Farrell. Carter and Benton treat a suicidal patient. Lewis worries about depressed Dr. Cvetic--who can't be found.

programme.title: Dodgeball ThundERdome S1 2
programme.desc: Contestants compete for a shot at $25,000 as they brave the world's most unforgiving battleground.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S5 07
programme.desc: Michael and his fellow employees debate the authenticity of a giant lizard and find a game with a very specific target audience. Then at the diner, he adds some spice to lunch time and gives patrons the chills while demonstrating a new way to cool soup. Finally at the furniture store, Michael shows his coworker that impossible things can happen in the blink of an eye.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S5 08
programme.desc: In this special crossover event, the Impractical Jokers help Michael stun coffee bar customers - but soon discover the joke is on them! Plus, Michael's woodland creatures display fantastic hidden abilities.

programme.title: Storage HuntERs S3 5
programme.desc: A deadly bin puts all the buyers on edge. It's a bad omen that casts a dark shadow over the day. As the day winds to a fever pitch, Brandon and Lori square off against Scott and Chrissy in a do or die bidding war that sends all strategy out the window. And later, our competitors uncover a high-tech find they think could worth thousands. But all that glitters may not be gold.

programme.title: Storage HuntERs S3 6
programme.desc: Cash flies over a locker that reveals a high-ticket mystery item. Then, everyone digs deep to win an ATM, but when the dust settles will this thing be filled with big bucks or major regret? And later, the unlikeliest of duos team up with a strategy that leaves our buyers' heads spinning.

programme.title: Caught! (Season 2) S2 3
programme.desc: Security cameras in front yards, backyards and street corners capture crimes, mishaps and earth-shattering moments like break-ins and hit-and-runs. It's up to local law enforcement to save the day.

programme.title: Caught! (Season 2) S2 4

programme.title: King Arthur: Legend Of The Sword
programme.desc: Acclaimed filmmaker Guy Ritchie brings his dynamic style to the epic fantasy action adventure \"King Arthur: Legend of the Sword.\" Starring Charlie Hunnam in the title role, the film is an iconoclastic take on the classic Excalibur myth, tracing Arthur's journey from the streets to the throne. When the child Arthur's father is murdered, Vortigern (Jude Law), Arthur's uncle, seizes the crown. Robbed of his birthright and with no idea who he truly is, Arthur comes up the hard way in the back alleys of the city. But once he pulls the sword from the stone, his life is turned upside down and he is forced to acknowledge his true legacy...whether he likes it or not.

programme.title: Mad Max
programme.desc: Taking place in a dystopian Australia in the near future, Mad Max tells the story of a highway patrolman cruising the squalid back roads that have become the breeding ground of criminals foraging for gasoline and scraps. When his wife and child meet a grisly end at the hands of a motorcycle gang, Max sets out across the barren wastelands in search of revenge. Written by Cole Matthews.

programme.title: Dunkirk (2017)
programme.desc: Acclaimed filmmaker Christopher Nolan writes, directs and produces this wartime epic action thriller. Dunkirk opens as hundreds of thousands of British and Allied troops find themselves surrounded by enemy forces in the Northern French City during 1940 World War II. Trapped on the beach with the sea at their backs, they face an impossible situation as the German troops close in. The story unfolds on land, sea and air. RAF Spitfires engage the enemy in the skies above the Channel, trying to protect the defenseless men below. Meanwhile, a quickly assembled British fleet led the legendary evacuation of over 300,000 Allied military forces in what Prime Minister Winston Churchill would call a \"miracle of deliverance.\".

programme.title: Mad Max 2: The Road Warrior
programme.desc: In the post-apocalyptic Australian wasteland, a cynical drifter agrees to help a small, gasoline rich, community escape a band of bandits.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S5 01
programme.desc: Michael breezes into the Windy City to shock and amaze the Chicago locals. In a health store, he sells a supplement that proves you are what you drink, and at a Metro station, he utterly derails a commuter's sense of reality.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S5 02
programme.desc: In a local Chicago diner, Michael brings new meaning to the term \"hold the pickles.\" Plus, he discovers an aggressive new breed of fungus at a park, and later, he helps a coworker disappear from work early in a hospital warehouse.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S5 03
programme.desc: At a market, Michael reveals an amazing credit card hack, and at a science shop, he demonstrates how far stem cell research has come. Later, Michael spooks a gardener who's certain that angry gnomes are hunting him down!

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S5 04
programme.desc: Michael discovers a ferocious new breed of animal at a park, customers are steeped in confusion when Michael invades a local tea shop, and a woman gets her feathers ruffled when she realizes she's a witness to a transformation.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S5 05
programme.desc: Michael reveals the transformative properties of fruits and vegetables, and shows a caterer the true power of dairy products. Plus, an antique store customer is stunned when a species of termite literally chews through the scenery!

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S5 06
programme.desc: At an antique store, Michael shows off an impossible way to organize your clothes, and back at the supermarket we find out that there are some serious surprises lurking in our favorite foods. Finally, at the Navy Yard, Michael pushes his skills to the limit when he attempts one of his most ambitious feats yet - tricking two people at the same time!

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S5 07
programme.desc: Michael and his fellow employees debate the authenticity of a giant lizard and find a game with a very specific target audience. programme.title: The West Wing S1 21
programme.desc: Bartlet works to reform campaign finance.

programme.title: Blood Diamond
programme.desc: Academy Award nominees Leonardo DiCaprio and Djimon Hounsou join Academy Award winner Jennifer Connelly in this action drama from Ed Zwick, the filmmaker behind The Last Samurai. DiCaprio stars as Danny Archer, a mercenary smuggler searching for a priceless diamond amid the chaos of Sierra Leone's civil war; Hounsou (Gladiator), as a desperate father searching for his lost son; and Connelly (A Beautiful Mind), as a reporter searching for the truth behind the trade in 'conflict diamonds.' Forced to confront the brutal human cost of the diamond trade, Archer changes his search for financial reward to a quest for redemption.

programme.title: Friends S6 22
programme.desc: While Ross and Elizabeth are on a romantic weekend getaway at her family's cabin, Elizabeth's father and Rachel show up unexpectedly.

programme.title: Friends S6 23
programme.desc: Chandler finds the perfect engagement ring – then loses it. Rachel gets her wish to get Paul to reveal his emotions, but now he can't stop blubbering.

programme.title: Friends S6 24
programme.desc: Chandler's romantic marriage proposal is ruined when Monica's former boyfriend returns. (Part 1).

programme.title: Friends S6 25
programme.desc: Rachel and Phoebe choose \"backup\" husbands. (Part 2).

programme.title: Shazam!
programme.desc: We all have a superhero inside us, it just takes a bit of magic to bring it out. In Billy Batson’s (Asher Angel) case, by shouting out one word—SHAZAM!—this streetwise 14-year-old foster kid can turn into the adult Super Hero Shazam (Zachary Levi), courtesy of an ancient wizard (Djimon Hounsou). Still a kid at heart—inside a ripped, godlike body—Shazam revels in this adult version of himself by doing what any teen would do with superpowers: have fun with them! Can he fly? Does he have X-ray vision? Can he shoot lightning out of his hands? Can he skip his social studies test? Shazam sets out to test the limits of his abilities with the joyful recklessness of a child. But he’ll need to master these powers quickly in order to fight the deadly forces of evil controlled by Dr. Thaddeus Sivana (Mark Strong).

programme.title: Justice League (2017)
programme.desc: Fueled by his restored faith in humanity and inspired by Superman's selfless act, Bruce Wayne enlists the help of his newfound ally, Diana Prince, to face an even greater enemy. Together, Batman and Wonder Woman work quickly to find and recruit a team of metahumans to stand against this newly awakened threat. But despite the formation of this unprecedented league of heroes – Batman, Wonder Woman, Aquaman, Cyborg and The Flash – it may already be too late to save the planet from an assault of catastrophic proportions.

programme.title: Into The Storm
programme.desc: In the span of a single day, the town of Silverton is ravaged by an unprecedented onslaught of tornadoes. The entire town is at the mercy of the erratic and deadly cyclones, even as storm trackers predict the worst is yet to come. Most people seek shelter, while others run towards the vortex, testing how far a storm chaser will go for that once-in-a-lifetime shot. Told through the eyes and lenses of professional storm chasers, thrill-seeking amateurs, and courageous townspeople, \"Into the Storm\" throws you directly into the eye of the storm to experience Mother Nature at her most extreme.

programme.title: War Dogs
programme.desc: The Wolf of Wall Street's Jonah Hill and Whiplash's Miles Teller star in this dramedy based on a true story that follows two twenty-something Miami stoners who exploit a little-known government initiative during the Iraq War that allows small businesses to bid on U.S. Military contracts. Starting small, they begin raking in big money and are soon living the high life. But the pair gets in over their heads when they land a $300 million deal to arm the Afghan Military -- a deal that puts them in business with some very shady people, not the least of which turns out to be the U.S. Government. Comedy powerhouse Todd Phillips (The Hangover films) writes, directs and produces (with Bradley Cooper) this incredible true story based on a controversial Rolling Stone article.

programme.title: Mad Max Beyond ThundERdome
programme.desc: Max tracks his stolen belongings to a strange city called Bartertown, ruled with an iron fist by Aunty Entity, who is locked in a power struggle with her rival Master Blaster.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory S7 1
programme.desc: On the seventh season premiere, Sheldon and Penny bond in Leonard's absence, but it's Sheldon's feelings that are crushed when Leonard returns from the North Sea.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory S7 2
programme.desc: Raj gets consoled about his ex-girlfriend and Howard's relationship with his mother causes an unusual threat to his masculinity in the second half of the season seven premiere.

programme.title: Inception
programme.desc: Your mind is the scene of the crime. Box-office superstar Leonardo DiCaprio stars in this contemporary science fiction action film set \"within the architecture of the mind.\" Written, directed and produced by Oscar and Golden Globe nominee Christopher Nolan (The Dark Knight, Batman Begins, The Prestige), this eagerly awaited follow-up to 2008's billion-dollar blockbuster is yet another visionary tale from a startingly original filmmaker who continually raises the bar with every film he makes. Shooting in London, Paris, Tangiers, Calgary and Los Angeles, Nolan's mind-bending film also stars Academy Award winners Michael Caine and Marion Cotillard, in addition to Juno's Ellen Page, Batman Begins' Cillian Murphy and Oscar nominees Ken Watanabe (The Last Samurai) and Tom Berenger (Platoon).

programme.title: Gran Torino
programme.desc: Retired auto worker, Korean War veteran and widower Walt Kowalski (Clint Eastwood) sets out to reform his neighbor, a young Hmong teenager, who tried to steal Kowalski's prized possession: a 1972 Ford Gran Torino he keeps in mint condition.

programme.title: Friends S6 22
programme.desc: While Ross and Elizabeth are on a romantic weekend getaway at her family's cabin, Elizabeth's father and Rachel show up unexpectedly.

programme.title: Friends S6 23
programme.desc: Chandler finds the perfect engagement ring – then loses it. Rachel gets her wish to get Paul to reveal his emotions, but now he can't stop blubbering.

programme.title: Friends S6 24
programme.desc: Chandler's romantic marriage proposal is ruined when Monica's former boyfriend returns. (Part 1).

programme.title: Friends S6 25
programme.desc: Rachel and Phoebe choose \"backup\" husbands. (Part 2).

programme.title: Blade RunnER
programme.desc: A blade runner must pursue and try to terminate four replicants who stole a ship in space and have returned to Earth to find their creator.

programme.title: Cry Macho
programme.desc: A former rodeo star and washed-up horse breeder goes on a redemptive journey to Mexico to retrieve his ex-boss' son in this moving drama.

programme.title: King Richard
programme.desc: Based on the true story of Venus and Serena Williams, this film follows their undeterred father's journey in raising the tennis superstars.
